title: Has the "Every Time Period, If "Status" Is "Something", Notify, "Person"" automation been replaced?
excerpt: I have used this automation several times before but I cannot find it anymore, has this been removed? If so, does anyone have suggestions for replacing it?

posts.author: KieranBiscoe (Kieran)
posts.cookedHtml: I have used this automation several times before but I cannot find it anymore, has this been removed? If so, does anyone have suggestions for replacing it?

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
